empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please provide me with more details such as your full name, address, phone number, and email associated with the order so that we may investigate further on what might have caused the delay in delivering your package? Once I get all of these information, I will personally escalate it to our shipping team immediately and keep you updated throughout the process.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out for some help with my order, <ORDER_ID>, which was supposed to be delivered three weeks ago. I'm still waiting for my <PRODUCT> to arrive and unfortunately, I haven't received any updates from the courier. Please could you look into this for me and let me know if there's a revised delivery date or if I can expect a refund so I can make alternative arrangements? I'd really appreciate your help with this, thank you.
